description_long: This is a modern, front-loading washing machine with a rectangular, boxy form and a smooth, light gray exterior. The front face features a large circular glass door, allowing a view into the metallic drum inside, and is surrounded by a plastic or metal rim. Above the door, there is a control panel with a digital display, several buttons, and a detergent drawer on the left side, all clearly labeled and easily accessible. The sides and back of the machine are plain, with no visible vents or handles, emphasizing a minimalist design. The washing machine appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with a transparent glass or acrylic window in the door. Its overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, suitable for placement in urban environments such as laundromats, apartment buildings, or garages.
description: A modern, front-loading washing machine with a large glass door, digital control panel, and a smooth, light gray exterior. The design is minimalist and functional, with visible interactive features on the front.
description_view_0: The left side of the washing machine, plain and featureless with a smooth, light gray surface.
description_view_1: The front view shows the circular glass door, control panel with digital display, buttons, and detergent drawer, all set in a light gray frame.
description_view_2: The right side of the washing machine, also plain and smooth, with the edge of the door slightly visible.
description_view_3: The back of the washing machine, unadorned and flat, with a small rectangular detail near the bottom right corner.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a digital display, several buttons, and a detergent drawer on the left. The controls are arranged horizontally and are clearly labeled.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular door with a transparent glass or acrylic window and a visible handle integrated into the rim.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is visible on the upper left side of the front panel, adjacent to the control panel.
attribute_drum_visibility: partially visible; the drum can be seen through the transparent door window, showing its metallic interior and perforated surface.
